uplink.description: Measurement frame, leak detected (digital input bit0 high)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (entree value [[1],[0],[0],[0]]) and normalizing input bit0 -> water.leak.

uplink.description: Measurement frame, no leak, with water temperature 21.50 degC
uplink._note: Synthetic; reference decodes entree [[0],[0],[0],[0]] and temperature0 21.5 degC (0x0866=2150 /100). bit0 low -> water.leak=false; temperature -> water.temperature.current.

uplink.description: Life/keep-alive frame, battery 3.600 V, supply 3.400 V
uplink._note: Synthetic; reference decodes tensionv 3.6 V (0x0E10=3600 /1000) and tensionc 3.4 V (0x0D48=3400 /1000). tensionv -> battery; tensionc -> chargeVoltage extra.
Synthetic; reference frame type 'Trame d'erreur' with ERR_BATTERY_LEVEL_LOW (0x95) and battery 3.6 V; normalized to an error result.
